title: Community exclusive: unveiling monday service (recording)
excerpt:

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
In this session, Roi and Guy from the monday service team explore different use cases and features of monday service and also give an inside scoop into the development process.

From IT support to Creative requests and anything in between, the brand-new product is dedicated to improving how you manage your ticketing workflows. If your team needs to capture external requests and effectively communicate with the customers directly from your monday board, this one is for you! More info about monday service here.

Any questions for the monday service team? Ask below!

posts.author: Cnichols (C N)
posts.cookedHtml: How do we get access to the beta to try this out?

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! Sorry for the delay here! Information on the beta is here: monday service
